content.text:
```mdl
@ NDA 2015‑04‑30 – Inspection of Stockholder List
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_8

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string,                 # party name (e.g., "Patriot Scientific Corp.")
    is_disclosing: bool,          # true for the Company, false for the Stockholder
    must_disclose_by_law: bool,   # true when a legal / regulatory demand to disclose arises
    notified_disclosing: bool     # true when the disclosing party has been notified
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – the two parties to the agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 3 – notice obligation when a legal demand to disclose Confidential Material arises
rule O notify_disclosing_when_required:
    receiving_party.must_disclose_by_law implies receiving_party.notified_disclosing now always
```
